analysis.title: Analysis Results
analysis.warning: This tool is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a medical diagnosis. If you are experiencing distress, suicidal thoughts, or feel anything is wrong, please seek immediate medical attention or contact emergency services.

interpretation.normal: Your scores are within the normal range. Continue maintaining your mental health practices.
interpretation.elevated: Your scores show mild to moderate symptoms. Monitor your well-being and consider reaching out if symptoms persist or worsen.
interpretation.high: Your scores indicate significant distress. Consider consulting a mental health professional for further evaluation and support.
